name: ui-test
description: No-code E2E testing framework - record and replay browser tests with YAML

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const cp=require('node:child_process');const path=require('node:path');const env=process.env;const isTrue=v=>String(v??'').toLowerCase()==='true';const isGlobal=isTrue(env.npm_config_global);const isExec=String(env.npm_command??'').trim()==='exec';const isRepoRoot=env.INIT_CWD&&path.resolve(env.INIT_CWD)===path.resolve(process.cwd());if(!(isExec||isGlobal||isRepoRoot)){console.error(['[ui-test] Standalone install policy: project-local installs are not supported.','','Install/run ui-test in standalone mode instead:','  Install ui-test globally (see README.md)','  ui-test setup','  For one-off usage, see README.md','','If ui-test is already installed in this project, clean it up:','  1) Remove ui-test from dependencies/devDependencies in package.json','  2) Run: npm uninstall ui-test','  3) Install ui-test globally (see README.md)','  4) Re-run: ui-test setup'].join('\n'));process.exit(1)}if(isGlobal&&fs.existsSync('.git')&&!fs.existsSync('./scripts/setup.mjs')){cp.execFileSync('git',['checkout','-f','HEAD','--','.'],{stdio:'inherit'})}if(isGlobal&&fs.existsSync('.git')&&fs.existsSync('./scripts/prepare-build.mjs')&&!fs.existsSync('./dist/bin/ui-test.js')){cp.execFileSync(process.execPath,['./scripts/prepare-build.mjs'],{stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.quality:ci: npm run lint && npm run lint:typed && npm run typecheck:prod && npm test
